lines.speaker: Zanaris choir
lines.text: What do you want? We're trying to sing! Leave us alone and we won't bother you!

lines.speaker: Zanaris choir
lines.text: Where are you going? Can we come too?

lines.speaker: Zanaris choir
lines.text: Why do you resort to violence so often?

lines.speaker: Zanaris choir
lines.text: If you should think of cutting a tree, don't do it!

lines.speaker: Zanaris choir
lines.text: We do hope we are not too annoying!

lines.speaker: Zanaris choir
lines.text: Look at that outfit! Can't you afford a decent one?

lines.speaker: Zanaris choir
lines.text: Are you going to craft cosmic runes? Can we come too?

lines.speaker: Zanaris choir
lines.text: Just go about your business and ignore us!
